# Creatives

**API Collection**

Create and manage ad creatives within your organization.

## Overview

You assign [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative] objects to your [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/Apple_Ads/custom-product-pages]. You can assign one [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Creative] per custom product page per organization. After assigning your creative, the next step is to [doc://com.apple.appleads/documentation/apple_ads/Create-an-Ad] object to assign to an ad group.

## Creative Endpoints

- **Create a Creative**: Creates a creative object within an organization.
- **Find Creatives**: Finds creatives within an organization.
- **Get a Creative**: Fetches a creative by identifier.
- **Get All Creatives**: Fetches all creatives within an organization.

## Creative Request and Response Objects

- **AppPreviewDevicesMappingResponse**: The app preview device mapping response to display name and size mapping requests.
- **Creative**: The creative object.
- **CreativeLocalization**: The localized creative metadata.
- **CreativeLocalizationWithAssets**: The localized creative metadata with app preview.
- **CustomProductPageCreative**: The creative details of a product page.
- **CreativeResponse**: The response details of a creative request.
- **CreativeListResponse**: A container for response details of a creative request.
- **DefaultProductPageCreative**: The default product page object.
- **MediaAppAsset**: The asset details of app preview or app screenshots.
- **MediaAppAssetsDetail**: The app asset details of a device.

## Data Types

- **CreativeType**: The type of creative.
- **CreativeState**: The system state of the creative.
- **CreativeStateReason**: Reasons the system provides when an ad isn’t running.

## Custom Product Page Ads

- **Ads**: Assign an ad creative to an ad group.
- **Ad Rejection Reasons**: Review reasons for an ad rejection.
- **Custom Product Pages**: View Custom Product Page details.
